zh.lifeSummary: 當John Giffard Esq於1431年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾特易福德時，他的父親Thomas Giffard23歲，母親Eleanor de Vaux26歲。他於大約1450年與Alice結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1506年在他的家鄉享年75歲，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾特易福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Giffard Esq于1431年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾特易福德时，他的父亲Thomas Giffard23岁，母亲Eleanor de Vaux26岁。他于大约1450年与Alice结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1506年在他的家乡享年75岁，埋葬在英国巴金哈姆爾特易福德。

nameMeanings.name: Giffard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: (i) relationship name from the Continental Germanic personal name Gifard. (ii) nickname, perhaps sometimes from Old French giffard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Guiver
meanings: English: (i) nickname, apparently from Middle English giver ‘giver, donor, bestower’. (ii) variant of Giffard with voicing of /f/ to /v/ and loss of final -d.

variants.name: Gafford
meanings: English (southeastern): assimilated form of Gatford, a name of various origins. In Sussex and Surrey it is perhaps a variant of the habitational name Catford from a place so called in Somerset. Gatford is also from the habitational names Gateford (in Worksop, Nottinghamshire) or Gateforth (near Selby, Yorkshire), both formed with Old English gāt ‘goat’ + ford ‘ford’, influenced by Old Norse geit ‘goat’.

Probably also an altered form of German Gaffert: habitational name from Gaffert near Köslin, Brandenburg, or from a personal name formed with Middle High German gate ‘fellow, companion’. The surname Gaffert is very rare in Germany.

English: perhaps an altered form of Gatewood , an occupational name for a ‘goatherd’ (Middle English gate-werde, Old English gātweard) or for a ‘gate keeper’ (Middle English gateward, Old English ʒeatweard, dialect gātward).

variants.name: Gifford
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Giffard Esq was born in 1431, in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Thomas Giffard, was 23 and his mother, Eleanor de Vaux, was 26. He married Alice about 1450. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died in 1506, in his hometown, at the age of 75, and was buried in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Giffard Esq est né en 1431, à Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Giffard, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Vaux, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Alice environ 1450. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1506, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Giffard Esq 1431 in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Giffard 23 und seine Mutter Eleanor de Vaux 26. Er hat um 1450 Alice geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb 1506 im Alter von 75 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Alice circa 1450. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel 1506, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Giffard Esqが1431年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアトウイフォードで生まれた時，父Thomas Giffardは23歳，母Eleanor de Vauxは26歳であった。約1450年にAliceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1506年に故郷で75歳で死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアトウイフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Giffard Esq(이)가 1431년 영국 벅잉함실르 트w이퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Giffard(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor de Vaux(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1450년 Alice(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1506년 그의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르 트w이퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Giffard Esq nasceu em 1431, em Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Giffard, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Vaux, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice aproximadamente 1450. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1506, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Giffard Esq родился в 1431 г. в местности твифорд, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Giffard было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Vaux, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice около 1450 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер в 1506 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности твифорд, буккингхамшир, Англия.

Se casó con Alice aproximadamente 1450. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en 1506, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
